topic: The closet light in my apartment is on every morning and the fixture has no bulb in it
title: The Closet Light in My Apartment Is On Every Morning. The Fixture Has No Bulb. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The closet light in my bedroom is on every morning. The fixture has no bulb in it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a bedroom closet door at dawn with a soft yellow glow visible at the bottom seam, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Rental apartment. Six months. Walk in closet off the bedroom.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a small bedroom at dusk with a closed walk in closet door on one wall, dim ambient light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Open the closet daily for clothes.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand turning a small brass closet doorknob, only the hand visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First noticed the glow under the door.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a bedroom floor showing a thin line of soft yellow light spilling from the gap beneath a closet door, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Thought I had left a flashlight inside.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a small walk in closet with clothes hanging neatly on a rod and a small overhead fixture visible above, dim glow inside, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Empty except clothes. Glow comes from the fixture itself.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a small ceiling light fixture inside a closet with the housing glowing softly yellow from inside, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Removed the bulb when I moved in. Never replaced it. Burnt out.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of an empty light bulb socket inside a closet ceiling fixture, the threads visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Looked inside the socket. The metal contacts are glowing yellow.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a closet ceiling light socket with the small metal contacts at the base glowing soft yellow, dim closet interior light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Cut power to the closet breaker.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a residential breaker panel with one switch flipped to the off position, dim utility room light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Glow persisted. Brighter on Tuesdays. Brightest at three fourteen AM.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a darkened bedroom at night with a brighter yellow glow visible spilling from beneath a closet door, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I keep the closet door closed.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a closet door wedged shut with a small wooden door wedge against the floor, dim bedroom light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The yellow glow is now visible from under the bedroom door too. It is spreading.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a hallway at night looking at a closed bedroom door with soft yellow light spilling from the gap beneath it, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
